title: Beehiiv vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Klaviyo email marketing platforms. Learn pricing, features, and which tool suits your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Klaviyo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Beehiiv and Klaviyo are both powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv caters to newsletter publishers and media operators, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Ad network, newsletter monetization, referral program

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher or independent media operator looking to monetize your audience
You want a free tier that supports up to 2,500 subscribers without paid features
You value affiliate commission opportunities and built-in growth tools like referral programs
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar platforms
You need advanced marketing automation flows and SMS capabilities alongside email
You want predictive analytics to optimize customer behavior and increase sales

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with its monetization features and generous free tier, while Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce businesses needing advanced automation and SMS. Choose based on your primary business model.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Beehiiv is slightly cheaper at $39/month versus Klaviyo's $45/month for paid plans. More importantly, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers compared to Klaviyo's 500, making it more affordable for growing publishers.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your email list and contacts to Beehiiv, though automation flows and complex segmentation will need to be rebuilt manually. Both platforms support CSV imports and have data migration resources available to simplify the transition.
